title: Noor Wrenhaven

summary: Founder of Windrose.

Noor Wrenhaven is the founder of Windrose. Noor wants a technical co-founder intro before committing.

---
title: Windrose
type: company
summary: Seed-stage company. Founded by Noor Wrenhaven.
---

Windrose is a seed-stage company. Founded by Noor Wrenhaven. The seed conversation started in 2025.

turns.text: Just wrapped the Windrose call with Noor Wrenhaven.
Noor is worried the Windrose pricing model undercuts their gross margin. Real concern for the round.
I committed to sending Noor the diligence checklist by Friday.
